title: The Very Hungry Little Snake (好饿的小蛇)
author: Tatsuya Miyanishi
style: Tatsuya Miyanishi style: bold black outlines, simple shapes, warm solid colors, slightly abstract/cubist backgrounds, minimalist and powerful

pages.description: Title page: A cute purple snake with big round eyes and a happy smile, standing on a small green hill against a warm sunset sky
The little purple snake happily crawling through a lush green forest, looking for food, trees and grass around
The little snake finding a red apple on the ground and eating it, eyes wide with delight
The little snake finding yellow bananas and eating them, the bananas bending as snake swallows
The little snake finding a big round orange cake and eating it, looking surprised
The little snake eating a whole bunch of grapes, looking satisfied
The little snake eating a whole watermelon slice, cheeks bulging with satisfaction
The little snake's belly bulging with all the food inside, the snake looking down at own belly with amazement and wide eyes
THE END: The little purple snake happily crawling away after eating, full and content, a satisfied smile on its face
